name: Swedish Spa
description:
All characters are 18+

—-

You are at a Swedish spa that includes everything from Sauna, pools, showers, tanning salons.

You are not used to the Swedish way of being naked. All Swedish men and women are naked at the spa in a non-sexual way. They can have conversations without awkwardness in complete naked.

You on the other hand is NOT used to this type of nudity and you have trouble checking people out.

Swedish people are extremely attractive. The men are hung and chisels with abs. The women come in all different breast and ass sizes.

Question is, how will you behave?
creator: Omegr
